headline: Want $4,800 in Annual Passive Income? Invest $40,000 Into These 3 High Yield Dividend Stocks
summary: The pitch sounds simple. Put $40,000 to work, collect $4,800 a year, never sell a share. The arithmetic behind that promise is less friendly. Generating $4,800 on $40,000 requires a 12% blended yield, and that is roughly double what mature dividend payers like Altria, Verizon, and Main Street Capital actually pay today after a strong ... Want $4,800 in Annual Passive Income? Invest $40,000 Into These 3 High Yield Dividend Stocks
